mechanism_narrative: A declining FEDFUNDS path signals easier discounting and lower recession risk, which raises equity valuations and supports positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: If 20d forward SPX returns are not positive in at least 55% of months where FEDFUNDS falls over a 3-month window, or rolling Rank IC stays below 0.03 for 2 consecutive years, reject the hypothesis.

mechanism_narrative: When UNRATE rises sharply, labor market stress precedes slower consumption and weaker earnings expectations, which pressures S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if triggered episodes produce positive 20d SPX returns in more than 60% of cases, or if the average 20d return in triggered states is not below the unconditional mean by at least 1 percentage point.

mechanism_narrative: A synchronized rise in RSAFS and HOUST indicates broad domestic demand acceleration that lifts revenue growth expectations and supports positive S&P 500 returns over the following quarter.
failure_condition: Reject if joint high-growth states in RSAFS and HOUST do not outperform baseline on 60d forward returns, or if one series alone explains the effect and the interaction term is not positive in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained rise in INDPRO with stable or falling CPIAUCSL indicates real output growth without inflation pressure, which improves margins and supports positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint regime does not deliver higher 20d SPX returns than either series alone, or if returns are negative in a majority of triggered observations.

mechanism_narrative: Inflation acceleration in CPIAUCSL combined with unchanged policy rates raises real rate pressure and risk premia, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if inflation-above-policy episodes are followed by positive 20d SPX returns more than 55% of the time, or if the interaction coefficient is not negative in out-of-sample windows.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in GDPC1 indicates a weakening demand backdrop that should lower corporate revenue expectations and S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Reject if negative GDPC1 growth quarters are not associated with below-baseline 60d SPX returns, or if the signal loses directional accuracy below 50% over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A falling PAYEMS trend together with a rising UNRATE trend signals labor deterioration that weakens spending and earnings expectations, depressing S&P 500 returns over the next week.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint PAYEMS-UNRATE deterioration does not lead to negative 5d returns more often than not, or if the interaction adds no predictive value beyond either series alone.

mechanism_narrative: In a housing-led slowdown, weak HOUST readings signal falling construction demand and broader cyclical softness, which should precede negative S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if simultaneous declines in HOUST and RSAFS do not produce below-average 20d SPX returns, or if triggered instances are positive more than 60% of the time.
